questions.answer: Install @clerk/nextjs, add API keys to .env.local, wrap app in ClerkProvider, and create middleware.
Use createRouteMatcher in clerkMiddleware to protect specific routes.

questions.topic: how to get the current user
questions.answer: Use currentUser() in server components or useUser() in client components.

steps.code:
import { currentUser } from '@clerk/nextjs/server'
const user = await currentUser()

import { useUser } from '@clerk/nextjs'
const { user, isLoaded } = useUser()

questions.answer: Use the <SignOutButton> component or call signOut() from useClerk().

steps.code:
const { signOut } = useClerk()
await signOut({ redirectUrl: '/' })

questions.topic: how to add sign in and sign up pages
questions.answer: Create catch-all routes at /sign-in and /sign-up using Clerk's prebuilt components.

questions.topic: how to access session in server action
questions.answer: Use auth() from @clerk/nextjs/server to get the userId in server actions or route handlers.

steps.code:
const { userId } = await auth()
if (!userId) throw new Error('Unauthorized')
